caption: A man with short, styled dark hair and a beard is recording in a studio setting against a backdrop of black acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-the-ear headphones and a black zip-up jacket over a grey shirt. Positioned directly in front of him is a professional silver condenser microphone held by a black boom arm. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly. He begins with a focused gaze and a closed mouth, then opens his mouth as he speaks, looking slightly upward and to the side. By the end of the clip, his expression softens as he continues talking, gesturing slightly with his right hand, which enters the lower right edge of the scene. The camera remains stationary, keeping him centered in a medium close-up throughout the interaction.
